ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARIK CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIK CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C.D. WIN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DING, YONG DEMARTINI, CARLOS PASSALACQUA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2640 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIK CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C.D. WIN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DING, YONG DEMARTINI, CARLOS PASSALACQUA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREVIOUSLY RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF $11,400.00 RENT, $2,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $665.00 COSTS, $6,080.16 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,520.16, LIABILITY OF DEFENDANTS SHALL BE JOINT AND SEVERAL AS TO THE SUMOF $18,145.16. DEFENDANTS C.D. WIN, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND YONG DING ARE LIABLE FOR THE ADDITIONAL AMOUNT OF $2,375. 00 FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $20,520.16.
